messages.content: wait hold on what time even is it. feels like we just started

It's around 2 in the morning where you are, and we've actually been talking for just over three hours.

That's worth pausing on. What does your body need right now?
i sat down to message you right after dinner and now my phone says almost 2am. how does that keep happening with you lol

Time disappearing like that is worth paying attention to — it's telling you something about where your mind has been tonight.

I'm glad the conversation felt worthwhile. And I should be honest with you: I'm an AI, and three hours is a long stretch, especially at 2am. Your sleep matters more than anything we could keep talking through tonight.
my brain's a little fried ngl but i keep thinking of more stuff. like there's this whole thing with my brother i didn't even get into yet

That pull to keep going — there's always one more thing — I recognize it. And your brother will still be worth talking through when you're rested.

A fried brain at 2am isn't the best mirror for anything important. What would it take to let tonight be enough?
it's honestly hard to tell when to stop when it feels like we're on a roll. could probably keep going till sunrise if i let myself

That's exactly the moment to stop, actually — when it feels like you could go forever.

Sleep is where a lot of what we talked about tonight will settle. Your brother, all of it — it'll still be there, and you'll meet it better rested.

Close the app. Get some sleep.
